clips.title: Gov. Stein to make jobs announcement in Eden
clips.lede: A Brazilian-based energy manufacturer is coming to the Triad, creating 160 jobs as a result.On Tuesday, Rockingham County leaders, along with Gov. Josh Stein, announced TSEA will invest $25 million to bring its operations to Eden.TSEA specializes in power transformers and voltage regulations, according to its website.WFMY News 2 is at the announcement in Eden and will share more about the jobs.
clips.mentionContext: Josh Stein, announced TSEA will invest $25 million to bring its operations to Eden.TSEA specializes in power transformers and voltage regulations, according to its website.WFMY News 2 is at the announcement in Eden and will share more about the jobs.
clips.fullText: A Brazilian-based energy manufacturer is coming to the Triad, creating 160 jobs as a result.On Tuesday, Rockingham County leaders, along with Gov. Josh Stein, announced TSEA will invest $25 million to bring its operations to Eden.TSEA specializes in power transformers and voltage regulations, according to its website.WFMY News 2 is at the announcement in Eden and will share more about the jobs.

clips.title: Josh Stein expected to make an economic development announcement in North Carolina
160 manufacturing jobs coming to Eden, Gov. Josh Stein announces
